title: Scan4D Semantics JSON Schema
description: Per-face mesh classification data generated alongside a Scan4D mesh export

classes.description: Ordered list of classification labels. The index of each label is used in the per-face classifications arrays.

face_count.description: Number of faces in this anchor's mesh geometry.

classifications.description: Per-face classification index into the top-level 'classes' array. Length equals face_count.
